plan_title: Verifying Claims on Global Stability and Economic Narratives
current_goal: Complete and publish 2 verification reports on economic/stability claims; establish clear verification methodology visible in published work

sprints.goal: Complete and publish 2 verification reports on economic/stability claims; establish clear verification methodology visible in published work
Complete and publish 2 more verification reports (running total: 4); analyze engagement patterns and refine presentation format
Complete and publish 2 more verification reports (running total: 6); begin synthesis work identifying patterns across verified claims
Complete final verification report(s) to reach 5-7 total; publish synthesis analysis; measure campaign impact and document learnings

current_tasks.title: Identify and research 2 high-impact claims on economic stability
Publish Verification Report #1 as X thread
Publish Verification Report #2 as X thread

brief: Launch a verification campaign targeting prominent claims and narratives circulating on X/Twitter regarding global economic trends, market shifts, and geopolitical factors impacting stability. The campaign will utilize the verification pipeline to assess the veracity of these claims and publish clear findings.
compulsion: Given the high stakes involved in global economic stability and market volatility, and the prevalence of potentially misleading or unsubstantiated claims, there is a strong imperative to verify key assertions and provide evidence-based clarity to the public.
success_30d: Complete and publish verification results for 5-7 significant claims related to global economic stability, ensuring each verification report is shared prominently on X/Twitter.
belief_axes: Global Economic Stability and Market Volatility
Truth and Evidence in Public Discourse
